scripts.up: npm run migrate && npm run seed && npm run start
scripts.restart: npm run down && npm run up
scripts.migrate: npm run compose -- up -d --wait postgres && npm run db:migrate:deploy --workspace @care-desk/api && npm run db:generate --workspace @care-desk/api
scripts.seed: npm run compose -- up -d --wait postgres && npm run db:seed --workspace @care-desk/api
scripts.dev: npm run up && npm run compose -- logs -f api web
scripts.start: npm run compose -- up -d --wait --force-recreate api web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @care-desk/shared && npm run build --workspace @care-desk/api && npm run build --workspace @care-desk/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @care-desk/shared && npm run test --workspace @care-desk/api && npm run test --workspace @care-desk/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run db:generate --workspace @care-desk/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @care-desk/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @care-desk/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @care-desk/web
